vo_text: Born on July 16? Your card is the Queen of Clubs. In Cardology it's called The Nurturing Leader. Treat it as a mirror, not a forecast. You're the intellectual queen. You're the wise guide. You're stewarding knowledge wisely, teaching with intuitive authority and care. Your gifts: deep wisdom and thoughtful guidance, ability to create intellectual safety for growth, and natural mentoring and empowering ability. You have wisdom, understanding, and the natural ability to mentor. You create intellectual safety where people can grow. The shadow side? You think you know what others need intellectually. You prescribe thinking instead of facilitating discovery. Find your own card free — link in bio. Card Blueprints.
title: Born July 16? Your Birth Card Is the Queen of Clubs #shorts
caption:
Born on July 16, your Cardology birth card is the Queen of Clubs.
A mirror, not a forecast. Find your own card free at cardblueprints.com.
